subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto Thee, O our God, inasmuch as Thou hast given us to drink the choice wine of Thy knowledge from the chalice of Thy bounty, and hast ordained for us to stand in Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهنا بما سقیتنا رحیق عرفانک من کاس عطائک و قدرت لنا الحضور امام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God
